## 📋 Today's Overview
*April 16, 2026*

### Superconductivity (6 new today)

1. The study focuses on a **superconducting resonator parametric amplifier**, employing a **non-degenerate pumping scheme** to address the challenges of achieving continuous gain and phase-sensitive amplification.
2. The study focuses on **two capacitively coupled superconducting nanowires**, employing **perturbative and semiclassical approaches** to investigate the mass-induced Coulomb drag effect mediated by quantum phase slips.
3. The study focuses on the **proposed high-temperature superconductors Li₂AuH₆ and Li₂AgH₆**, employing **path integral molecular dynamics simulations** to verify their kinetic stability at ambient pressure.
4. The study focuses on a **3D chiral superconductor with cubic symmetry**, employing a **low-energy effective field theory** to address the emergence of vestigial charge-4e/6e superconductivity and a chiral metal phase from thermal fluctuations.
5. The study focuses on a **superconducting nanowire with a gate-controlled nanoscale hotspot**, employing an **electrothermal-switch mechanism** to solve the challenge of creating an electrically programmable and scalable superconducting diode.
6. The study focuses on **multiorbital superconducting systems, particularly nickelates**, employing **Raman response calculations** to address the problem of determining the superconducting gap symmetry and size.

### spin glass (3 new today)

1. The study focuses on the two-dimensional Ising spin glass, employing a renormalization group fixed-point analysis to address the absence of a finite-temperature phase transition.
2. The study focuses on Fe-intercalated NbSe₂, employing stoichiometry-controlled synthesis and structural characterization to address the correlations between composition, structure, and antiferromagnetic order.
3. The study focuses on gene regulatory networks, employing a theoretical framework integrating epigenetic feedback to address how dynamical landscapes shape cellular states.

| 1 | **[Non-degenerate pumping of superconducting resonator parametric amplifier with evidence of phase-sensitive amplification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2505.06155v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting resonator parametric amplifiers are potentially important components for a wide variety of fundamental physics experiments and utilitarian applications. We propose and realise an operating scheme that achieves amplification through the use of non-degenerate pumps, which addresses two key challenges in the design of parametric amplifiers: non-continuous gain across the amplification band and pump tone removal. We have experimentally demonstrated the non-degenerate pumping scheme using a half-wave resonator amplifier based on NbN thin-film, and measured a peak gain of 26 dB and 3-dB bandwidth of 0.5 MHz. The two non-degenerate pump tones were positioned ~10 bandwidths above and below the frequency at which peak gain occurs. We have found the non-degenerate pumping scheme to be more stable compared to the usual degenerate pumping scheme in terms of gain drift over time, by a factor of 4. This scheme also retains the usual flexibility of NbN resonator parametric amplifiers in terms of reliable amplification in a ~4 K environment, and is suitable for cross-harmonic amplification. The use of pump tones at different frequencies allows phase-sensitive amplification when the signal tone is degenerate with the idler tone. A gain of 23 dB and squeezing ratio of 6 dB were measured.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导谐振参量放大器是多种基础物理实验与实用应用中潜在的关键元件。我们提出并实现了一种利用非简并泵浦实现放大的工作方案，该方案解决了参量放大器设计中的两个关键挑战：放大频带内增益不连续以及泵浦信号滤除问题。我们基于氮化铌薄膜半波谐振放大器，通过实验验证了非简并泵浦方案，测得峰值增益为26分贝，3分贝带宽为0.5兆赫兹。两个非简并泵浦频率分别设置在峰值增益频率上下约10倍带宽处。我们发现，与常见的简并泵浦方案相比，非简并泵浦方案在增益随时间漂移方面稳定性更高，漂移量减少了四分之三。该方案还保留了氮化铌谐振参量放大器在约4开尔文环境下可靠放热的常规灵活性，并适用于交叉谐波放大。当信号与闲频简并时，使用不同频率的泵浦可实现相位敏感放大。实验测得增益为23分贝，压缩比为6分贝。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Songyuan Zhao et al. |
| 2 | **[Mass-induced Coulomb drag in capacitively coupled superconducting nanowires](https://arxiv.org/abs/2508.18943v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate Coulomb drag in a system of two capacitively coupled superconducting nanowires. In this context, drag refers to the appearance of a stationary voltage in the passive wire in response to a current bias applied to the active one. Quantum phase slips (QPS) in the biased wire generate voltage fluctuations that can be transmitted to the other. Using perturbative and semiclassical approaches, we show that when both wires are superconducting the induced voltage vanishes due to exact cancellation of plasmon contributions. By contrast, when the second wire is tuned below the superconductor-insulator transition and develops a mass gap, this cancellation is lifted and a finite drag voltage emerges. The drag coefficient exhibits a crossover from weak drag in short wires to a maximal value set by the mutual capacitance in long wires. A semiclassical picture of voltage pulse propagation clarifies the physical origin of the effect: the mass term synchronizes plasmon modes and prevents complete cancellation of induced signals. Our results establish a mechanism of mass-induced Coulomb drag in low-dimensional superconductors and suggest new routes for probing nonlocal transport near quantum criticality.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们研究了两个电容耦合的超导纳米线系统中的库仑拖拽效应。在此背景下，拖拽效应指在主动线施加电流偏置时，被动线中产生稳态电压的现象。偏置线中的量子相位滑移产生电压涨落，并可传递至另一根线。通过微扰和半经典方法，我们证明当两根线均处于超导态时，由于等离激元贡献的精确抵消，感应电压为零。相反，当第二根线被调控至超导体-绝缘体转变以下并形成能隙时，这种抵消被解除，从而出现有限的拖拽电压。拖拽系数表现出从短导线中的弱拖拽到长导线中由互电容设定的最大值的跨域行为。电压脉冲传播的半经典图像阐明了该效应的物理起源：质量项使等离激元模式同步，并阻止感应信号的完全抵消。我们的研究结果确立了低维超导体中质量诱导库仑拖拽的机制，并为探测量子临界点附近的非局域输运提供了新途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Aleksandr Latyshev et al. |
| 3 | **[Kinetic instability and superconductivity in Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ at ambient pressure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12367v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ have been proposed as promising candidates for high-temperature superconductors under ambient pressure. While previous studies confirm the dynamic stability of these two thermodynamically unstable systems, their kinetic stability remains to be verified. In this work, we use path integral molecular dynamics simulations to examine the kinetic stability of Li$_2$AuH$_6$ and Li$_2$AgH$_6$ under ambient pressure. We find both compounds are kinetically unstable. Li$_2$AgH$_6$ undergoes lattice collapse, whereas Li$_2$AuH$_6$ retains a stable fluorite-type Li-Au sublattice, but hydrogen atoms partially dimerize into molecules and diffuse within the host lattice. Using the stochastic path-integral approach, which is a nonperturbative approach applicable to systems with diffusive atoms, we investigate the superconductivity of Li$_2$AuH$_6$ in this state. We predict a superconducting transition temperature of 22 K, well below earlier predictions, due to the low density of states at the Fermi level caused by the collapse of hydrogen sublattice and hydrogen dimerization.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Li$_2$AuH$_6$ 和 Li$_2$AgH$_6$ 被提出作为常压下高温超导体的有希望的候选材料。虽然先前研究证实了这两个热力学不稳定体系的动力学稳定性，但其动力学稳定性仍有待验证。在本工作中，我们利用路径积分分子动力学模拟研究了常压下 Li$_2$AuH$_6$ 和 Li$_2$AgH$_6$ 的动力学稳定性。我们发现两种化合物均具有动力学不稳定性。Li$_2$AgH$_6$ 发生晶格坍塌，而 Li$_2$AuH$_6$ 虽能保持稳定的萤石型 Li-Au 亚晶格，但氢原子部分二聚成分子并在主晶格内扩散。利用适用于扩散原子体系的非微扰方法——随机路径积分方法，我们研究了 Li$_2$AuH$_6$ 在此状态下的超导电性。我们预测其超导转变温度为22开尔文，远低于先前的预测，这是由于氢亚晶格坍塌和氢二聚化导致费米能级处态密度降低所致。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Yucheng Ding et al. |
| 4 | **[Charge-4e/6e superconductivity and chiral metal from 3D chiral superconductor](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12328v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Unconventional superconductivity (SC) characterized by multi-fermion orderings has attracted substantial attention. However, previous studies have largely focused on 2D systems or 3D systems with effective 2D symmetries. Here, we investigate the vestigial phases arising from thermal fluctuations of chiral SC in 3D systems governed by the cubic $O_h$ point group. By constructing low-energy effective Hamiltonians via Ginzburg-Landau analysis and conducting Monte Carlo simulations, we systematically investigate the phase fluctuations of chiral orders within the $E_g$ and $T_{2g}/T_{1u}$ irreducible representations (IRRPs). We identify a phase diagram topology different from 2D counterparts, where the multi-phase intersection manifests as a tetracritical point rather than the triple point typically found in 2D systems. We elucidate the evolution of these phases under thermal fluctuations. Our findings reveal that for both $E_g$ and $T_{2g}/T_{1u}$ IRRPs, the primary chiral orders could melt into a chiral metallic phase across specific parameter regimes. Moreover, for the $E_g$ IRRP, phase fluctuation could also induce a charge-$4e$ phase under certain regime, while for the $T_{2g}$ and $T_{1u}$ IRRPs, it leads to a higher-order charge-$6e$ SC state. Our work paves the way for exploring exotic vestigial orders driven by non-trivial 3D crystalline symmetries.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>以多费米子序为特征的非传统超导电性引起了广泛关注。然而，先前研究主要集中在二维系统或具有有效二维对称性的三维系统上。在此，我们研究了由立方 $O_h$ 点群支配的三维系统中手性超导序的热涨落所产生的遗迹相。通过金兹堡-朗道分析构建低能有效哈密顿量并进行蒙特卡洛模拟，我们系统地研究了 $E_g$ 和 $T_{2g}/T_{1u}$ 不可约表示内手性序的相位涨落。我们识别出与二维系统不同的相图拓扑结构，其中多相交点表现为四临界点，而非二维系统中常见的三重点。我们阐明了这些相在热涨落下的演化。我们的研究结果表明，对于 $E_g$ 和 $T_{2g}/T_{1u$ 不可约表示，原始手性序在特定参数范围内可能融化为手性金属相。此外，对于 $E_g$ 不可约表示，相位涨落在一定条件下也可能诱导出电荷-$4e$ 相；而对于 $T_{2g}$ 和 $T_{1u}$ 不可约表示，则会导致更高阶的电荷-$6e$ 超导态。我们的工作为探索由非平凡三维晶体对称性驱动的奇异遗迹序开辟了道路。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Chu-Tian Gao et al. |
| 5 | **[Nanoscale electrothermal-switch superconducting diode for electrically programmable superconducting circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.12313v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting diodes enable dissipationless directional transport, yet achieving electrical tunability and scalability remains a major challenge for circuit-level integration. Here, we demonstrate an electrothermal-switch superconducting diode in which a gate-controlled nanoscale hotspot dynamically breaks inversion symmetry in a superconducting nanowire. This mechanism gives rise to two coexisting nonreciprocal transport regimes-one associated with a nonreciprocal superconducting-to-normal transition and the other with ratchet-like vortex dynamics-both originating from the same electrothermal-switch process. The diode exhibits efficiencies up to 42% and 60% for the two regimes, respectively, and can be electrically switched on, off, or reversed in polarity in situ by applying a small gate current. These capabilities enable programmable superconducting circuits that realize electrically reconfigurable full-wave and half-wave rectification. The lithography-compatible design, high performance, and gate-controlled functionality establish a scalable platform for programmable superconducting electronics and hybrid quantum systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导二极管可实现无耗散的方向性输运，但实现电可调性与可扩展性仍是电路级集成的主要挑战。在此，我们展示了一种电热开关超导二极管，其中栅极控制的纳米尺度热点动态地打破了超导纳米线中的反演对称性。该机制产生了两种共存的非互易输运区域——一种与非互易的超导-正常态转变相关，另一种与类棘轮涡旋动力学相关——两者均源于同一电热开关过程。该二极管在两种区域下的效率分别高达42%和60%，并且可通过施加小的栅极电流原位实现电开关、关闭或极性反转。这些功能使得可编程超导电路能够实现电可重构的全波和半波整流。这种光刻兼容的设计、高性能以及栅控功能，为可编程超导电子学和混合量子系统建立了一个可扩展的平台。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Tianyu Li et al. |
| 6 | **[Raman response in superconducting multiorbital systems with application to nickelates](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11997v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The recent discovery of high-$T_c$ superconductivity in pressurized and thin film nickelates is nowadays one of the most relevant and active topics in solid-state physics. The origin of superconductivity together with the relevance of multiorbital physics are highly discussed issues in this field. Knowledge of the size of the gap and its symmetry is of fundamental interest to uncover the superconducting mechanism at play in the nickelates. Electronic Raman scattering is a powerful tool to investigate the main characteristics of the gap. Here, we investigate the Raman response in the superconducting phase for three different models: Two-orbital models, including $d_{x^2-y^2}$ and $d_{z^2}$ orbitals, with one and two layers; as well as a bilayer model with the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ orbital as the only active one. For each of these models, we consider different pairing symmetries and determine their characteristic fingerprints in the Raman response. For the two-orbital models, we perform full multiorbital calculations including interorbital and intraorbital scattering, and compare the results with those obtained using the additive Raman response where each band is considered separately. Our results should be useful for discussing the minimal model for superconductivity and its pairing symmetry in nickelates. The obtained results and discussions, as well as the presented formalism, are also of general interest for other multiorbital systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期在加压及薄膜镍酸盐中发现的高温超导现象，已成为凝聚态物理领域最受关注且活跃的研究课题之一。该领域中，超导性的起源以及多轨道物理的相关性均是备受争议的核心议题。掌握能隙的大小及其对称性，对于揭示镍酸盐中超导机制的本质具有根本性意义。电子拉曼散射是研究能隙主要特征的有力工具。本文中，我们研究了三种不同模型在超导相中的拉曼响应：包含$d_{x^2-y^2}$和$d_{z^2}$轨道的双轨道模型（涉及单层与双层结构），以及仅以$d_{x^2-y^2}$轨道为活性轨道的双层模型。针对每种模型，我们考虑了不同的配对对称性，并确定了它们在拉曼响应中的特征指纹。对于双轨道模型，我们进行了包含轨道间散射和轨道内散射的完整多轨道计算，并将结果与采用叠加拉曼响应（即各能带被单独考虑）所得的结果进行了比较。我们的研究结果应有助于探讨镍酸盐超导性的最小模型及其配对对称性。所获得的结果与讨论，以及所呈现的形式体系，对于其他多轨道系统也具有普遍的参考价值。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Matías Bejas et al. |
| 7 | **[Bulk-dissociated topological bands without spin-orbit coupling in hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.08675v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Topological superconductors (TSCs) in superconducting hybrid heterostructures, which integrate superconducting and non-superconducting materials, have been intensely investigated with the hope of discovering exotic non-Abelian anyons for fault-tolerant quantum computing. In this effort, a challenge for hybrid superconducting systems is controlling hybridization, which is often a balance between enhancing the superconducting proximity effect at the cost of suppressing desirable electronic properties such as strong spin-orbit interactions. Hence, discovering hybrid superconducting systems with topological properties controlled and enhanced by material geometry design without spin-orbit interactions would be intriguing to explore. In this work, we theoretically study a square superconducting network decorated with spin-polarized magnetic adatoms. We find that localized Yu-Shiba-Rusinov bound states at magnetic adatom sites collectively form a weak topological superconducting phase despite the absence of spin-orbit interactions. We then demonstrate that by tuning the Fermi energy of the network, the system can transition from a weak TSC phase to a bulk-dissociated TSC phase where the edge state bands separate from the bulk, giving rise to unexpected features such as nodal lines and co-existing bulk-dissociated edge and corner modes. Moreover, our findings highlight how hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials can serve as a useful template for controlling the coupling and dissociation between electronic degrees of freedom of different dimensionalities.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在由超导与非超导材料集成的超导混合异质结构中，拓扑超导体（TSCs）已被深入研究，以期发现可用于容错量子计算的奇异非阿贝尔任意子。在此过程中，混合超导系统面临的一个挑战是控制杂化，这通常需要在增强超导邻近效应与抑制诸如强自旋-轨道相互作用等理想电子特性之间取得平衡。因此，探索一种无需自旋-轨道相互作用、仅通过材料几何设计即可控制和增强拓扑特性的混合超导系统将极具研究价值。本工作中，我们从理论上研究了一种装饰有自旋极化磁性吸附原子的正方形超导网络。我们发现，尽管没有自旋-轨道相互作用，磁性吸附原子位点处的局域Yu-Shiba-Rusinov束缚态会共同形成一个弱拓扑超导相。随后我们证明，通过调节网络的费米能，系统可以从弱拓扑超导相转变为体解离拓扑超导相，其中边缘态能带与体态分离，并产生诸如节线以及体解离的边缘态与角态共存等意想不到的特征。此外，我们的研究结果凸显了异维超导超材料如何作为一个有用的模板，用于控制不同维度电子自由度之间的耦合与解离。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Joseph J. Cuozzo et al. |
| 8 | **[Gyrokinetic equilibria of high temperature superconducting magnetic mirrors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11684v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>High-temperature superconducting (HTS) magnets and other advances have led to renewed interest in magnetic mirrors for fusion energy. The non-Maxwellian nature of mirror plasmas necessitates kinetic modeling to predict, optimize and design mirrors. Explicit gyrokinetic full-f codes can be used to study instabilities and turbulent transport in tokamaks and mirrors, but they have been prohibitively expensive to integrate directly over the very long time scales required to compute kinetic plasma equilibrium. We demonstrate that these studies are now feasible thanks to novel multiscale methods delivering a 30,000X speed-up. The resulting kinetic equilibrium, electrostatic potential, and ion confinement time are consistent with analytic theory. This transformative capability opens the door to a new way of obtaining equilibria for mirrors, and we discuss how this technique may also accelerate calculations for tokamaks and stellarators. The models presented in this article address critical multiscale problems in modeling magnetic mirrors, opening a new research avenue for equilibrium studies using an explicit continuum gyrokinetic code.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>高温超导（HTS）磁体及其他技术进步重新激发了人们对用于聚变能的磁镜装置的关注。磁镜等离子体的非麦克斯韦特性要求采用动力学建模来预测、优化和设计磁镜。显式回旋动力学全分布代码可用于研究托卡马克和磁镜中的不稳定性与湍流输运，但将其直接积分到计算等离子体动力学平衡所需的极长时间尺度上，其计算成本一直高得令人望而却步。我们证明，得益于能实现30,000倍加速的新型多尺度方法，这些研究现在已成为可能。由此得到的动力学平衡、静电势和离子约束时间均与解析理论一致。这一变革性能力为获取磁镜平衡开辟了一条新途径，我们也讨论了该技术如何可能加速托卡马克和仿星器的计算。本文提出的模型解决了磁镜建模中的关键多尺度问题，为使用显式连续谱回旋动力学代码进行平衡研究开辟了一条新的研究途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Maxwell H. Rosen et al. |
| 9 | **[Dynamics of superconducting pairs in the two-dimensional Hubbard model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.01124v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The frequency structure of the superconducting correlations in cuprates gives insights on the pairing mechanism. Here we present an exhaustive study of this problem in the two-dimensional Hubbard model with cellular dynamical mean-field theory. To this end, we systematically quantify the dependence on doping $δ$ and interaction strength $U$ of the superconducting gap, of the frequency scales where $d$-wave pairing occurs, and of their relative contribution to pairing. For all values of $U$ and $δ$, we find pair-forming processes confined to frequencies set by the superexchange interaction and followed by pair-breaking processes, ruling out both pair-forming and pair-breaking processes on the scale of $U$. This suggests that at high frequencies, the effect of $U$ is eliminated by the $d$-wave paring, and that at small frequencies, $U$ generates the superexchange interaction that leads to low-frequency pair-forming processes providing the net contribution to pairing.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>铜酸盐中超导关联的频率结构为理解其配对机制提供了线索。本文中，我们利用团簇动力学平均场理论对二维哈伯德模型中的这一问题进行了详尽研究。为此，我们系统地量化了超导能隙、d波配对发生的频率尺度及其对配对相对贡献对掺杂浓度δ和相互作用强度U的依赖性。对于所有U和δ值，我们发现配对形成过程局限于由超交换相互作用设定的频率范围，随后是配对破坏过程，排除了在U尺度上发生配对形成和配对破坏过程的可能性。这表明，在高频区域，U的效应被d波配对消除；而在低频区域，U产生了超交换相互作用，从而导致了低频配对形成过程，这些过程提供了配对的净贡献。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | G. Sordi et al. |
| 10 | **[From GDSII to Wafer: EDA Design Flow and Data Conversion for Wafer-Scale Manufacturing of Superconducting Quantum Chips](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11379v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting quantum computing is advancing toward the thousand- and even million-qubit regime, making wafer-scale fabrication an essential pathway for achieving large-scale, cost-effective quantum processors. This manufacturing paradigm imposes new requirements on quantum-chip electronic design automation (Q-EDA): design tools must not only generate layouts (GDSII files) that satisfy quantum-circuit physical constraints but also ensure that the design data can be seamlessly converted into a complete set of manufacturing files executable by a wafer foundry, thereby enabling reliable translation from design intent to physical chip. This paper focuses on this critical data-conversion pipeline and presents a systematic treatment of the Q-EDA technology stack for wafer-scale fabrication. Starting from GDSII as the single authoritative data source, we analyze the key stages including process-design-kit (PDK)-based design rule checking (DRC), layout-versus-schematic (LVS) verification, design for manufacturability (DFM) optimization, wafer layout planning, and mask data preparation (MDP). We describe the concrete architecture of a Q-EDA system, present nine quantum-specific DRC rules together with their physical underpinnings and a multi-layer process stack model, and benchmark the manufacturing data-flow coverage of mainstream Q-EDA tools. Finally, we discuss the core challenges and future directions in this field.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导量子计算正朝着千比特乃至百万比特规模迈进，这使得晶圆级制造成为实现大规模、高性价比量子处理器的重要途径。这种制造范式对量子芯片电子设计自动化（Q-EDA）提出了新要求：设计工具不仅需要生成满足量子电路物理约束的版图（GDSII文件），还必须确保设计数据能够无缝转换为一套完整的、可由晶圆代工厂执行的制造文件，从而实现从设计意图到物理芯片的可靠转化。本文聚焦于这一关键的数据转换流程，并系统性地阐述了面向晶圆级制造的Q-EDA技术栈。以GDSII作为单一权威数据源，我们分析了关键阶段，包括基于工艺设计套件（PDK）的设计规则检查（DRC）、版图与原理图对照（LVS）验证、可制造性设计（DFM）优化、晶圆布局规划以及掩模数据准备（MDP）。我们描述了一个Q-EDA系统的具体架构，提出了九条量子专用的DRC规则及其物理基础和一个多层工艺栈模型，并对主流Q-EDA工具的制造数据流覆盖度进行了基准测试。最后，我们讨论了该领域的核心挑战与未来方向。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Ling Qiao et al. |
| 11 | **[Superconductivity and Electronic Structures of Nickelate Thin Film Superstructures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.03502v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelates have emerged as a crucial platform for exploring the mechanisms of high-temperature superconductivity. However, the Fermi surface topology required for superconductivity remains elusive. Here, beyond the superconducting pure bilayer (2222) phase, we report the thin film growth and ambient-pressure superconductivity of monolayer-bilayer (1212) and bilayer-trilayer (2323) superstructures, together with the absence of superconductivity in monolayer-trilayer (1313) superstructure, under identical compressive epitaxial strain. The onset superconducting transition temperatures range from 46 to 50 K, exceeding the McMillan limit. Angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy reveals key Fermi surface differences in these atomically-engineered structures. In superconducting 1212 and 2222 films, a dispersive hole-like band ($γ^{\mathrm{II}}$) forms an underlying Fermi pocket, surrounding the Brillouin zone corner. In contrast, the top of the flat band ($γ^{\mathrm{III}}$) is observed ~70 meV below $E_\text{F}$ in the non-superconducting 1313 films. Particularly, the superconducting 2323 films host both $γ^{\mathrm{II}}$ and $γ^{\mathrm{III}}$ bands. The polarization dependence of the $γ$ bands reveals their Ni $d_{z^2}$ origin. Our findings expand the family of ambient-pressure nickelate superconductors and establish a connection between structural configuration, electronic structure, and the emergence of superconductivity in nickelates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>Ruddlesden-Popper（RP）镍酸盐已成为探索高温超导机制的关键平台。然而，超导性所需的费米面拓扑结构仍不明确。本文中，除了超导的纯双层（2222）相外，我们报道了在相同压缩外延应变下，单层-双层（1212）和双层-三层（2323）超结构的薄膜生长及其常压超导性，以及单层-三层（1313）超结构不具超导性的现象。起始超导转变温度范围在46至50 K之间，超过了麦克米兰极限。角分辨光电子能谱揭示了这些原子级工程结构中的关键费米面差异。在超导的1212和2222薄膜中，一个色散的类空穴能带（γ^II）在布里渊区角点周围形成了一个基础费米口袋。相比之下，在非超导的1313薄膜中，观察到平带（γ^III）的顶部位于费米能（E_F）以下约70 meV处。特别是，超导的2323薄膜同时拥有γ^II和γ^III能带。γ能带的偏振依赖性揭示了其Ni d_{z^2}轨道起源。我们的发现扩展了常压镍酸盐超导体家族，并在镍酸盐中建立了结构构型、电子结构与超导性出现之间的联系。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Zihao Nie et al. |
| 12 | **[Synthetic areas spread in two-dimensional Superconducting Quantum Interference Filter Arrays](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.15020v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting Quantum Interference Devices (SQUIDs), formed by incorporating Josephson junctions into loops of superconducting material, are the backbone of many modern quantum sensing systems. It has been demonstrated that, by combining multiple SQUID loops into a two-dimensional (2D) array, it is possible to fabricate ultra-high-performing Radio frequency sensors. However, to function as absolute magnetometers, current-in-use arrays require the area of each SQUID loop in the array to be incommensurate. Doing so forbids the achievement of their full potential of performance, limited only by the standard quantum limit. This is because imposing incommensurability in the areas contrasts with optimised performance in each single SQUID loop. In this work, we report that by selectively inserting bare sections of a superconducting circuit with no Josephson junctions, 2D SQUID arrays can operate as an absolute magnetometer even when no physical area spread is applied. Based on a generalisation of current available theories, a complete analytical formulation for the one-to-one correspondence between the distribution of these bare loops and what we call a synthetic area spread is unveiled. This synthetic spread represents the equivalent physical spread of incommensurate SQUID loops that you would use to obtain the absolute Voltage-Magnetic Flux response if no bare loops were in use. Our work opens the way to a broader use of this technology for the fabrication of ultra-high-performance absolute quantum sensors. Our approach is also experimentally verified by fabricating several 2D Superconducting Quantum Interference Filter (SQIF) arrays incorporating bare superconducting loops and by demonstrating that they behave in alignment with what is suggested by our theory.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>超导量子干涉器件（SQUID）通过将约瑟夫森结嵌入超导材料环中构成，是现代许多量子传感系统的核心。研究表明，将多个SQUID环组合成二维阵列，可以制造出性能极高的射频传感器。然而，要作为绝对磁强计使用，当前所用的阵列要求其中每个SQUID环的面积不可公度。这种做法阻碍了其性能达到仅受标准量子极限限制的完全潜力，因为施加面积不可公度性与优化每个独立SQUID环的性能相矛盾。本工作中，我们报道了通过选择性地插入不含约瑟夫森结的超导电路裸环段，即使不施加物理面积展宽，二维SQUID阵列也能作为绝对磁强计工作。基于对现有理论的推广，我们揭示了这些裸环的分布与所谓的“合成面积展宽”之间一一对应的完整解析公式。这种合成展宽代表了等效的不可公度SQUID环物理展宽，即如果不使用裸环，为获得相同的电压-磁通绝对响应所需采用的展宽。我们的工作为利用该技术制造超高性能绝对量子传感器开辟了更广阔的道路。我们的方法也通过制备多个包含超导裸环的二维超导量子干涉滤波器阵列并证明其行为与理论预测一致，得到了实验验证。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Ross D. Monaghan et al. |
| 13 | **[Type-II superconductivity in the Dirac semimetal PdTe2](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11047v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report on the microscopic superconducting properties of the Dirac semimetal PdTe2. In this study, we have focused on mosaic crystals of PdTe2, and used detailed zero field and transverse field muon spin relaxation/rotation ($μ$SR), ac-magnetic susceptibility, and resistivity measurements to investigate their superconducting properties. The magnetic susceptibility measurements reveal two superconducting transition temperatures at 1.8 and 1.6~K, respectively, in agreement with earlier reports. In contrary to these reports, we find that these mosaic PdTe2 crystals, are not type-I, but rather type-II superconductors. In fact, we observe the clear manifestation of a flux line lattice through a clear diamagnetic shift and Gaussian broadening of the Fourier spectra in the superconducting state. This behavior is likely caused by the disorder in the mosaic crystals of PdTe2 studied here. Our analysis of the superconducting order parameter by the means of temperature dependent magnetic penetration depth $λ(T)$ reveals a fully gapped superconducting state that can be well-fitted using an s-wave symmetric gap. We find that PdTe2 is a promising model system for the investigation and interplay of non-trivial topology, surface superconductivity, and type-II bulk superconductivity in a van-der-Waals material. Moreover, our results indicate that the superconductivity in this material can be easily modified from type-I to type-II by disorder in the system.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报告了狄拉克半金属PdTe₂的微观超导特性。本研究聚焦于PdTe₂的镶嵌晶体，利用详细的零场和横向场μ子自旋弛豫/旋转、交流磁化率及电阻率测量来研究其超导特性。磁化率测量揭示了分别在1.8 K和1.6 K的两个超导转变温度，与早期报道一致。但与这些报道相反，我们发现这些镶嵌PdTe₂晶体并非I型，而是II型超导体。事实上，我们通过超导态下清晰的抗磁位移和傅里叶谱的高斯展宽，观察到了磁通线晶格的明确表现。这种行为很可能是由所研究的PdTe₂镶嵌晶体中的无序引起的。我们通过温度依赖的磁穿透深度对超导序参量进行分析，揭示了一个完全能隙的超导态，可以用s波对称能隙很好地拟合。我们发现PdTe₂是一个用于研究范德瓦尔斯材料中非平凡拓扑、表面超导性和II型体超导性及其相互作用的理想模型系统。此外，我们的结果表明，该材料中的超导电性可以通过系统中的无序轻易地从I型转变为II型。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Ritu Gupta et al. |
| 14 | **[Reentrant Superconductivity in Zeeman Fields](https://arxiv.org/abs/2602.14507v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We propose a theoretical model for a superconductor that exhibits the reentrant superconductivity in Zeeman fields. The Bogoliubov-de Gennes Hamiltonian includes three vectors in spin space: a $d$ vector of a spin-triplet superconducting state, a potential representing spin-orbit interactions, and a Zeeman field. When the three vectors are perpendicular to one another, the spin-orbit interaction suppresses superconductivity in weak Zeeman fields and enhances superconductivity in strong Zeeman fields. The instability (stability) of superconducting state is characterized by the appearance of odd-frequency (even-frequency) Cooper pairs.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了一个在塞曼场中表现出重入超导电性的超导体理论模型。Bogoliubov-de Gennes哈密顿量包含自旋空间中的三个矢量：自旋三重态超导态的d矢量、代表自旋轨道相互作用的势以及塞曼场。当这三个矢量彼此垂直时，自旋轨道相互作用在弱塞曼场下抑制超导电性，而在强塞曼场下增强超导电性。超导态的不稳定性（稳定性）以奇频（偶频）库珀对的出现为特征。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Tomoya Sano et al. |
| 15 | **[Microstructural Topology as a Prescriptor for Quantum Coherence: Towards A Unified Framework for Decoherence in Superconducting Qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.03951v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>In superconducting quantum circuits, decoherence improvements are frequently obtained through process interventions that simultaneously modify surface chemistry, microstructural topology, and device geometry, leaving mechanistic attribution structurally underdetermined. Predictive materials engineering requires measurable structural statistics to be separated from geometry-dependent coupling coefficients into independently testable factors. We introduce the concept of classical and quantum microstructure. In that context, we formulate a channel-wise separable framework for decoherence in superconducting transmon qubits in which each loss channel is described by a reduced prescriptor. Here, a channel-specific microstructural state variable is determined independently of device geometry, and a geometry-dependent coupling functional is computable from field solutions without reference to surface chemistry. We derive this product form from a spatially resolved kernel representation and establish a perturbative separability criterion that defines the regime where independent variation of the variables is valid. The framework specifies five prescriptor classes for dominant loss pathways in transmon-class devices. Falsifiability is operationalized through a pre-committed 2x2 experimental protocol in which the variables must satisfy independent ratio checks within propagated uncertainty. A Minimum-Dataset Specification standardizes reporting for cross-laboratory inference. Part I establishes the conceptual and mathematical architecture; coordinated experimental validation is reserved for Part II.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>在超导量子电路中，退相干性能的改进通常通过同时改变表面化学、微观结构拓扑和器件几何形状的工艺干预来实现，这使得对机制的归因在结构上无法确定。预测性材料工程要求将可测量的结构统计量与几何依赖的耦合系数分离为可独立测试的因子。我们引入了经典与量子微观结构的概念。在此背景下，我们为超导transmon量子比特中的退相干建立了一个通道可分离的框架，其中每个损耗通道由一个简化的预描述符描述。在此，通道特定的微观结构状态变量独立于器件几何形状确定，而几何依赖的耦合泛函可通过场解计算，无需参考表面化学。我们从空间分辨的核表示推导出这种乘积形式，并建立了一个微扰可分离性判据，定义了变量可独立变化的适用范围。该框架为transmon类器件中的主要损耗路径指定了五类预描述符。可证伪性通过一个预先承诺的2x2实验方案得以操作化，其中变量必须在传播的不确定度内满足独立的比率检验。一个最小数据集规范标准化了跨实验室推断的报告。第一部分建立了概念和数学架构；协调的实验验证留待第二部分。</p></details> | 2026-04-12 | Vinayak P. Dravid et al. |
| 16 | **[Ultrafast decoupling of the pseudogap from superconductivity in a pressurized cuprate](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10207v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The relationship between the pseudogap and superconductivity remains a central puzzle in the physics of cuprates. Hydrostatic pressure provides a clean tuning parameter free from chemical disorder, yet probing the microscopic energy scales of these phases under compression has remained experimentally challenging. Here, we utilize ultrafast optical spectroscopy to construct the high-pressure phase diagram of the underdoped cuprate Bi$_2$Sr$_2$CaCu$_2$O$_{8+δ}$ up to 37 GPa. Our results reveal a striking dichotomy within the pseudogap state: while the onset temperature $T^*$ rises monotonically with pressure, the energy gap $Δ_{\mathrm{PG}}$ is continuously suppressed. In contrast, the critical temperature $T_{\mathrm{c}}$ and the superconducting gap $Δ_{\mathrm{SC}}$ trace a correlated dome-like trajectory, demonstrating that superconductivity evolves independently from the pseudogap. Furthermore, an abrupt collapse of the gap ratio $2Δ_{\mathrm{SC}}/k_{\mathrm{B}}T_{\mathrm{c}}$ near 8 GPa marks a pressure-driven dimensional crossover, quenching two-dimensional phase fluctuations to stabilize global three-dimensional coherence. Upon reaching 37 GPa, the superconducting condensate is completely quenched into an insulating-like state. By resolving the extended phase evolution, our findings disentangle the pseudogap and superconducting orders, establishing a rigorous experimental basis for the pairing mechanism of high-temperature superconductivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>赝能隙与超导电性之间的关系仍然是铜氧化物物理中的一个核心难题。静水压提供了一个无化学无序的清洁调控参数，然而在压缩下探测这些相的微观能标在实验上一直具有挑战性。本文中，我们利用超快光学光谱构建了欠掺杂铜酸盐Bi₂Sr₂CaCu₂O₈₊δ在高达37 GPa压力下的相图。我们的结果揭示了赝能隙态内部一个显著的二分现象：虽然起始温度T*随压力单调上升，但能隙ΔPG被持续压制。相比之下，临界温度Tc和超导能隙ΔSC则描绘出一条相关的穹顶状轨迹，表明超导电性的演化独立于赝能隙。此外，在约8 GPa附近，能隙比2ΔSC/kBTc的突然崩塌标志着一个压力驱动的维度交叉，淬灭了二维相位涨落从而稳定了全局的三维相干性。当压力达到37 GPa时，超导凝聚被完全淬灭，进入类绝缘态。通过解析扩展的相演化，我们的研究结果厘清了赝能隙序与超导序，为高温超导的配对机制建立了严格的实验基础。</p></details> | 2026-04-11 | Yanghao Meng et al. |
| 17 | **[Strong Electron-Phonon Coupling and Multiband Superconductivity in Hexagonal BP3 Monolayer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10026v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We investigate the structural, electronic, and superconducting properties of a hexagonal BP3 monolayer using first-principles calculations combined with anisotropic Migdal-Eliashberg theory. The optimized structure exhibits a stable, slightly buckled configuration, as confirmed by phonon dispersion analysis and ab initio molecular dynamics simulations. The phonon spectrum indicates high-frequency vibrational modes associated with B-P bonding. Electronic band structure calculations reveal a multiband metallic state, with states near the Fermi level predominantly derived from pz orbitals of both boron and phosphorus atoms, forming two distinct Fermi surface sheets. The electron-phonon coupling is relatively strong, with a total coupling constant of lambda = 1.59, dominated by low- and intermediate-frequency phonon modes. Solving the anisotropic Migdal-Eliashberg equations yields a superconducting transition temperature of Tc = 9.7 K. The superconducting state is characterized by a nodeless but anisotropic gap structure, exhibiting two distinct gap values of approximately 2.25 and 1.74 meV associated with different Fermi surface sheets. These results identify the BP3 monolayer as a strongly coupled, multiband two-dimensional superconductor and provide insight into the role of orbital hybridization in electron-phonon-mediated superconductivity in low-dimensional systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们结合第一性原理计算与各向异性Migdal-Eliashberg理论，研究了六方BP3单层的结构、电子及超导性质。优化结构呈现稳定的轻微翘曲构型，这得到了声子色散分析和从头算分子动力学模拟的证实。声子谱显示出与B-P键相关的高频振动模式。电子能带结构计算揭示了多能带金属态，费米能级附近的状态主要源于硼和磷原子的pz轨道，并形成了两个不同的费米面。电子-声子耦合相对较强，总耦合常数λ = 1.59，主要由低频和中频声子模式主导。求解各向异性Migdal-Eliashberg方程得到超导转变温度Tc = 9.7 K。该超导态的特征是无节点但各向异性的能隙结构，与不同费米面对应的两个能隙值分别约为2.25 meV和1.74 meV。这些结果表明BP3单层是一种强耦合的多能带二维超导体，并为理解低维体系中轨道杂化在电子-声子介导的超导电性中的作用提供了见解。</p></details> | 2026-04-11 | Jakkapat Seeyangnok et al. |
| 18 | **[Decoding Superconductivity in La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ Thin Films via Ozone-Driven Structure and Oxidation Tuning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09807v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>The discovery of superconductivity in bulk Ruddlesden-Popper La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$(LNO327) under high hydrostatic pressure has redefined the recent experimental consensus that nickelate superconductivity is restricted to systems with a $3d^9$ electronic configuration and square-planar coordination. However, the structural and electronic prerequisites for stabilizing superconductivity, whether under pressure or at ambient conditions in the case of thin films, remain poorly understood, largely due to the metastable nature of the LNO327 phase. Here, we present a detailed structural study of epitaxial La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$ thin films by using scanning transmission electron microscopy (STEM) combined with electron energy loss spectroscopy (EELS). Grown via pulsed laser deposition onto SrLaAlO$_4$ substrates, those films exhibit distinct superconducting properties as a function of the different post-annealing conditions used. By correlating the rich landscape of stacking polymorphs with transport behavior, this work establishes a framework for understanding the metastable superconducting phase in bilayer nickelate thin films. Our findings underscore the critical role of homogeneity in oxygen stoichiometry, epitaxial strain and structural motif in stabilizing superconductivity, offering a clear pathway for designing ambient-pressure superconducting nickelates.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>块体Ruddlesden-Popper结构La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$(LNO327)在高压下超导电性的发现，重新定义了近期关于镍酸盐超导电性仅限于具有$3d^9$电子构型和平面四方配位体系的实验共识。然而，无论是在压力下还是在薄膜的常压条件下，稳定超导电性所需的结构和电子先决条件仍不清楚，这很大程度上源于LNO327相的亚稳态特性。本文通过结合扫描透射电子显微镜(STEM)与电子能量损失谱(EELS)，对外延La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_{7-δ}$薄膜进行了详细的结构研究。这些薄膜通过脉冲激光沉积在SrLaAlO$_4$衬底上生长，并因采用不同的后退火条件而表现出不同的超导特性。通过将丰富的堆垛多型性与输运行为相关联，本研究建立了一个理解双层镍酸盐薄膜中亚稳超导相的框架。我们的发现强调了氧化学计量均匀性、外延应变和结构基序在稳定超导电性中的关键作用，为设计常压超导镍酸盐提供了清晰的路径。</p></details> | 2026-04-10 | Mathieu Flavenot et al. |
| 19 | **[Resist-free shadow deposition using silicon trenches for Josephson junctions in superconducting qubits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09796v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Superconducting qubit fabrication innovations continue to be explored to achieve higher performance. Despite improvements to base layer fabrication and processing, resist-based Josephson junction (JJ) schemes have largely remained unchanged. The polymer mask during deposition causes chemical contamination and limits in situ and ex situ surface preparation, junction materials, and scalability. Here, we demonstrate a resist-free approach to junction fabrication based on etched silicon trenches that is CMOS compatible and easily integrated into existing innovations in qubit base layer fabrication and chemical processing. We fabricate Al-AlOx-Al JJs and qubits using this method, measuring median energy relaxation times up to 184 microseconds. We find minimal contamination at the substrate-metal interface and fluctuations of energy relaxation on a 35 hour timescale that are narrow and normally distributed. The method widens the process window for substrate preparation and new materials platforms.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>为实现更高性能，超导量子比特的制造创新仍在持续探索。尽管基础层制造和加工工艺有所改进，但基于光刻胶的约瑟夫森结方案在很大程度上保持不变。沉积过程中的聚合物掩模会导致化学污染，并限制了原位与异位表面处理、结材料选择以及可扩展性。在此，我们展示了一种基于刻蚀硅沟道的无光刻胶结制造方法，该方法与CMOS工艺兼容，并能轻松集成到现有的量子比特基础层制造和化学处理创新中。我们使用此方法制备了Al-AlOx-Al约瑟夫森结和量子比特，测得的中位能量弛豫时间长达184微秒。我们发现衬底-金属界面处的污染极小，且在35小时时间尺度上的能量弛豫波动范围窄且呈正态分布。该方法拓宽了衬底处理和新型材料平台的工艺窗口。</p></details> | 2026-04-10 | Tathagata Banerjee et al. |
| 20 | **[High-temperature superconductivity in Nd$_{0.85}$Sr$_{0.15}$NiO$_2$ membranes under pressure](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.09525v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Lattice compression has emerged as a fundamental tuning parameter for nickelate superconductivity. Pressure acts as a trigger to induce superconductivity in bulk Ruddlesden-Popper nickelates. For infinite-layer nickelate thin films, compressive epitaxial strain and rare-earth ion chemical pressure have been used to substantially enhance the superconducting transition temperature ($T_c$). Efforts to go further have been constrained by the limits of epitaxial stability or the challenges of measuring thin films in high-pressure environments. Here, we overcome this limitation by developing a technique to incorporate freestanding infinite-layer $\mathrm{Nd_{0.85}Sr_{0.15}NiO_2}$ membranes into a diamond anvil cell. Using this platform, we observe a strong increase in $T_c$ up to our highest measurement pressure of $\sim$90 GPa, where a superconducting downturn can be observed near liquid nitrogen temperatures. Strikingly, we find a simple linear enhancement of $T_c$ at a rate of 0.65 K GPa$^{-1}$, with no signs of saturation. This suggests that the pairing strength in infinite-layer nickelates can be raised to a surprisingly high scale, using an approach that can be broadly applied to many two-dimensional materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>晶格压缩已成为调控镍酸盐超导电性的一个基本参数。压力是诱导块体Ruddlesden-Popper镍酸盐产生超导电性的触发因素。对于无限层镍酸盐薄膜，压缩外延应变和稀土离子化学压已被用于显著提高超导转变温度($T_c$)。然而，进一步的努力受到外延稳定性极限或在高压环境下测量薄膜挑战的限制。在此，我们通过开发一种将自支撑无限层$\mathrm{Nd_{0.85}Sr_{0.15}NiO_2}$薄膜集成到金刚石对顶砧中的技术，克服了这一限制。利用该平台，我们观察到$T_c$直至最高测量压力$\sim$90 GPa均显著上升，在此压力下可在液氮温度附近观测到超导下降趋势。引人注目的是，我们发现$T_c$以0.65 K GPa$^{-1}$的速率呈简单线性增强，且无饱和迹象。这表明，利用一种可广泛应用于众多二维材料的方法，无限层镍酸盐中的配对强度可被提升至惊人的高水平。</p></details> | 2026-04-10 | Yonghun Lee et al. |

### spin glass

| **#** | **Title** | **Abstract** | **Date** | **Authors** |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | **[On the nature of the spin glass transition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.20163v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We recently showed that the two-dimensional Ising spin glass allows for a line of renormalization group fixed points which explains properties observed in numerical studies. We observe that this exact result corresponds to enhancement to a one-generator continuous internal symmetry. This finally explains why no finite temperature transition to a spin glass phase is observed in two dimensions. In more than two dimensions, instead, the continuous symmetry can be broken spontaneously and yields a spin glass order parameter which, for fixed temperature and disorder strength, takes continuous values in an interval. Such a feature is shared by the order parameter of the known mean field solution of the model with infinite-range interactions, which corresponds to infinitely many dimensions.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们近期研究表明，二维伊辛自旋玻璃存在一条重正化群不动点线，这解释了数值研究中观测到的特性。我们注意到这一精确结果对应着单生成元连续内对称性的增强。这最终解释了为何在二维体系中未观测到向自旋玻璃相的有限温度相变。而在超过二维的情况下，连续对称性可发生自发破缺，并产生一个自旋玻璃序参量——在固定温度和无序强度下，该序参量在区间内取连续值。此特征与已知的无限长程相互作用模型（对应无限维情形）的平均场解中的序参量特性一致。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Gesualdo Delfino et al. |
| 2 | **[Stoichiometry-Controlled Structural Order and Tunable Antiferromagnetism in $\mathrm{Fe}_{x}\mathrm{NbSe_2}$ ($0.05 \le x \le 0.38$)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.18993v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) enable magnetic property engineering via intercalation, but stoichiometry-structure-magnetism correlations remain poorly defined for Fe-intercalated $\mathrm{NbSe_2}$. Here, we report a systematic study of $\mathrm{Fe}_{x}\mathrm{NbSe_2}$ across an extended composition range $0.05 \le x \le 0.38$, synthesized via chemical vapor transport and verified by rigorous energy-dispersive x-ray spectroscopy (EDS) microanalysis. X-ray diffraction, magnetic, and transport measurements reveal an intrinsic correlation between Fe content, structural ordering, and magnetic ground states. With increasing $x$, the system undergoes a successive transition from paramagnetism to a spin-glass state, then to long-range antiferromagnetism (AFM), and ultimately to a reentrant spin-glass phase, with the transition temperatures exhibiting a nonmonotonic dependence on Fe content. The maximum Néel temperature ($T_{\mathrm{N}}$ = $\mathrm{175K}$) and strongest AFM coupling occur at $x=0.25$, where Fe atoms form a well-ordered $2a_0 \times 2a_0 $ superlattice within van der Waals gaps. Beyond $x = 0.25$, the superlattice transforms or disorders, weakening Ruderman-Kittel-Kasuya-Yosida (RKKY) interactions and significantly reducing $T_{\mathrm{N}}$. Electrical transport exhibits distinct anomalies at magnetic transition temperatures, corroborating the magnetic state evolution. Our work extends the compositional boundary of Fe-intercalated $\mathrm{NbSe_2}$, establishes precise stoichiometry-structure-magnetism correlations, and identifies structural ordering as a key tuning parameter for AFM. These findings provide a quantitative framework for engineering altermagnetic or switchable antiferromagnetic states in van der Waals materials.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>过渡金属二硫族化合物（TMDs）可通过插层实现磁性调控，但对于铁插层二硒化铌（$\mathrm{NbSe_2}$），其化学计量-结构-磁性关联仍不明确。本研究通过化学气相传输法合成了宽组分范围（$0.05 \le x \le 0.38$）的$\mathrm{Fe}_{x}\mathrm{NbSe_2}$样品，并采用严格的能量色散X射线光谱（EDS）微区分析进行验证。X射线衍射、磁性与输运测量揭示了铁含量、结构有序度和磁性基态之间的本征关联。随着$x$增大，体系经历从顺磁性到自旋玻璃态，再到长程反铁磁性（AFM），最终进入重入自旋玻璃相的连续转变，其转变温度对铁含量呈非单调依赖。最高奈尔温度（$T_{\mathrm{N}}$ = $\mathrm{175K}$）和最强反铁磁耦合出现在$x=0.25$处，此时铁原子在范德瓦尔斯间隙中形成有序的$2a_0 \times 2a_0 $超晶格。当$x > 0.25$时，超晶格发生转变或无序化，削弱了RKKY相互作用并显著降低$T_{\mathrm{N}}$。电输运特性在磁转变温度处呈现明显异常，印证了磁性态的演化。本研究拓展了铁插层$\mathrm{NbSe_2}$的组分边界，建立了精确的化学计量-结构-磁性关联，并指出结构有序化是调控反铁磁性的关键参数。这些发现为在范德瓦尔斯材料中设计交变磁性或可切换反铁磁态提供了定量框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Xiaotong Xu et al. |
| 3 | **[Epigenetic feedback reshapes dynamical landscapes in gene regulatory networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.24427v2)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Understanding how gene regulatory networks (GRNs) give rise to stable and dynamic cellular states remains a central challenge in theoretical biology, particularly when slow epigenetic feedback reshapes the underlying regulatory landscape. While experimental approaches such as single-cell transcriptomics reveal rich dynamical behaviour, a tractable theoretical framework that links gene expression, epigenetic control, and collective dynamics remains challenging. Here, we develop an extended Dynamical Mean Field Theory (DMFT) framework for GRNs that incorporates epigenetic modifications as slow, feedback-driven variables. Building on the analogy between Hopfield networks and spin glass systems, we derive effective stochastic equations that reduce high-dimensional dynamics to a tractable form across multiple timescales. This formulation enables quantitative characterization of both stable and oscillatory regimes and reveals how epigenetic feedback reshapes the effective potential landscape governing cell fate decisions. Our model shows how epigenetic feedback regulation dynamically reshapes the Waddington landscape. Our results and methodology provide a unified theoretical framework for understanding developmental dynamics and epigenetic reprogramming in complex biological systems.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>理解基因调控网络（GRNs）如何产生稳定和动态的细胞状态，尤其是当缓慢的表观遗传反馈重塑底层调控景观时，仍是理论生物学的核心挑战。虽然单细胞转录组学等实验方法揭示了丰富的动力学行为，但建立连接基因表达、表观遗传调控与集体动力学的可处理理论框架仍具挑战性。本研究针对GRNs发展了一个扩展的动力学平均场理论（DMFT）框架，将表观遗传修饰作为缓慢的反馈驱动变量纳入其中。基于霍普菲尔德网络与自旋玻璃系统的类比，我们推导出有效随机方程，将高维动力学简化为跨越多时间尺度的可处理形式。该框架实现了对稳定态与振荡态的定量表征，并揭示了表观遗传反馈如何重塑控制细胞命运决策的有效势能景观。我们的模型展示了表观遗传反馈调控如何动态重塑沃丁顿景观。研究结果与方法为理解复杂生物系统中的发育动力学与表观遗传重编程提供了统一的理论框架。</p></details> | 2026-04-14 | Sascha H. Hauck et al. |
| 4 | **[Quasi-linear `non-metallic' resistivity in the distorted-kagome metal CrPdAs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11630v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We report the growth and characterization of single crystals of the disorted-kagome lattice compound CrPdAs. Spin-glass behaviour with $T_{SG} \sim 60\ {\rm K}$ is observed in all crystals tested. Some growths show in addition a magnetic impurity phase with $T_c$ around 200 K, but annealing produces single-phase crystals without the ferromagnetic impurity phase. Single-phase crystals nevertheless have $29\pm 5\%$ anti-site disorder of the Cr and Pd sites, similar to a previous generation of flux-grown polycrystalline samples. We observe a large linear-coefficient of the heat capacity at low temperature, $γ= 23 \pm 3$ mJ/mole\,K$^2$, which is typical of kagome metals. The calculated band structure shows several Dirac band-crossings very near $E_F$ whose degeneracy is lifted when spin-orbit interaction is included. Our most curious finding is a `non-metallic' in-plane resistivity, extending over the entire measured temperature range from 300 K down to 2 K. This resistivity is quasi-linear below about 130 K, and shows no sign of saturation down to the lowest temperature measured.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们报道了扭曲Kagome晶格化合物CrPdAs单晶的生长与表征。在所有测试的晶体中均观察到自旋玻璃行为，其自旋玻璃转变温度$T_{SG} \sim 60\ {\rm K}$。部分生长批次还显示出$T_c$约200 K的磁性杂质相，但退火处理可生成不含铁磁杂质相的单相晶体。尽管如此，单相晶体中Cr位和Pd位仍存在$29\pm 5\%$的反位缺陷，这与前代助熔剂法生长的多晶样品情况相似。我们在低温下观测到较大的热容线性系数$γ= 23 \pm 3$ mJ/mol·K$^2$，这是Kagome金属的典型特征。计算的能带结构显示在$E_F$附近存在多个狄拉克能带交叉点，当计入自旋轨道耦合作用时，这些简并会被解除。我们最引人注目的发现是面内电阻率呈现“非金属性”，这一特性在从300 K到2 K的整个测量温区内持续存在。该电阻率在约130 K以下呈准线性，且在测量最低温下也未出现饱和迹象。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Benny Lau et al. |
| 5 | **[Heterophily as a generative mechanism for self-organized synergistic interdependencies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11545v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Understanding what and how causal dynamical mechanisms generate collective phenomena is a central challenge in complexity science. Recent studies have focused on identifying the mechanisms underlying the synergistic interdependencies that characterise these phenomena in systems with fixed interaction structures. Yet, real-world systems displaying collective phenomena, such as brains, societies, and ecosystems, are adaptive: interactions change in time. Here, we show that heterophily is a minimal local adaptive mechanism for the emergence of self-organized synergistic interdependencies. We study a paradigmatic spin-glass-like model with co-evolving couplings to show how heterophily generates the conditions for synergy to emerge. By solving the minimal $N=3$ case analytically, we reveal the precise mechanism: heterophily weakens pairwise dependencies while inducing high-order dependencies via geometric constraints on the configurations it selects. Together, these two effects underpin synergy. Numerical simulations confirm that this mechanism persists in large systems and that it is robust under parameter heterogeneities and dynamics. We demonstrate the applicability of our results by showing how heterophily can disrupt polarization while promoting synergistic information dynamics of opinions, where individuals' opinions are better explained by group-level influences than by pairwise ones. These results offer a parsimonious route to self-organized synergistic interdependencies in information-processing systems, with potential applications in computational social science, neuroscience, and biology.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>理解何种因果动力学机制以及它们如何产生集体现象，是复杂性科学的核心挑战。近期研究侧重于识别在具有固定交互结构的系统中，表征这些现象的协同相互依赖性的底层机制。然而，现实世界中展现集体现象的系统（如大脑、社会和生态系统）具有适应性：交互作用随时间变化。本文证明，异质性是一种能促使自组织协同相互依赖性出现的最小局部适应机制。我们研究了一个具有共演化耦合的典型自旋玻璃类模型，以揭示异质性如何为协同性的涌现创造条件。通过解析求解最小$N=3$情形，我们揭示了精确机制：异质性削弱了成对依赖性，同时通过对其所选构型施加几何约束而诱导出高阶依赖性。这两种效应共同构成了协同性的基础。数值模拟证实该机制在大规模系统中持续存在，并且在参数异质性和动力学变化下具有鲁棒性。我们通过展示异质性如何能瓦解极化同时促进观点的协同信息动力学（其中个体观点由群体层面影响而非成对影响能更好地解释），证明了我们结果的适用性。这些结果为信息处理系统中自组织协同相互依赖性提供了一条简约的路径，在计算社会科学、神经科学和生物学中具有潜在应用价值。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Enrico Caprioglio et al. |
| 6 | **[Tensor-Network Population Annealing](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.11155v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We propose a hybrid sampling method, tensor-network population annealing (TNPA), which combines tensor-network (TN) initialization with population annealing (PA). We apply this method to the two-dimensional Edwards-Anderson Ising spin glass. The approach is motivated by the limitations of existing methods: TN-based samplers can become numerically unstable in frustrated spin systems at low temperatures, whereas conventional PA requires a long annealing schedule when started from the high-temperature limit. In TNPA, TN contractions are used only within a reliable temperature range to generate initial configurations that are close to the equilibrium distribution. The subsequent low-temperature equilibration is then carried out by PA. To stabilize the initialization process, we introduce a diagnostic based on the effective sample size that adaptively selects the initialization temperature. The proposed framework provides a practical and physically motivated route to low-temperature sampling by combining the complementary strengths of TN and PA.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们提出了一种混合采样方法——张量网络群体退火（TNPA），该方法将张量网络（TN）初始化与群体退火（PA）相结合。我们将此方法应用于二维爱德华兹-安德森伊辛自旋玻璃。该方法的提出源于现有方法的局限性：基于TN的采样器在低温下的阻挫自旋系统中可能变得数值不稳定，而传统的PA从高温极限开始时需要很长的退火方案。在TNPA中，TN缩并仅在一个可靠的温度范围内使用，以生成接近平衡分布的初始构型。随后的低温平衡过程则由PA执行。为了稳定初始化过程，我们引入了一种基于有效样本量的诊断方法，以自适应地选择初始化温度。所提出的框架通过结合TN和PA的互补优势，为低温采样提供了一条实用且具有物理动机的途径。</p></details> | 2026-04-13 | Takumi Oshima et al. |
| 7 | **[Emergent Topological Universality and Marginal Replica Symmetry Breaking in Gauge-Correlated Spin Glasses](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.10309v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Recent tensor-network samplings of modified Nishimori spin glasses have revealed robust finite-temperature critical transitions in two dimensions, defying the standard Edwards-Anderson lower critical dimension boundary ($d_{l}\approx2.5$). We present a theoretical framework demonstrating that the discrete $Z_{2}$ gauge constraints utilized to bypass Monte Carlo kinetic traps fundamentally alter the system's universality class. By mapping the algorithmic disorder distribution to the 2D Ising Conformal Field Theory (CFT), we prove the emergent spatial variance generates a fractional momentum operator that drives the dynamic upper critical dimension to zero ($d_{u}\rightarrow0$). This marginal topology dynamically suppresses the replica-coupling vertices, yielding an infinite-order Berezinskii-Kosterlitz-Thouless (BKT) transition and a non-integrable replicon divergence that predicts a massive instability toward 1-step Replica Symmetry Breaking (1-RSB). Leveraging a spectral Corner Transfer Matrix Renormalization Group (CTMRG) architecture up to macroscopic scales ($L=1024$), we quantitatively validate the topological scaling argument $\mathcal{G}((T-T_{c})\ln(L/L_{0}))$. By isolating the continuum field theory from microscopic lattice artifacts, we recover the fundamental lattice metric $L_{0}\approx 0.94$, unequivocally confirming the existence of a distinct, topologically driven spin-glass phase.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>近期对修正西岛自旋玻璃的张量网络采样揭示了二维系统中存在鲁棒的有限温度临界相变，这挑战了标准的爱德华兹-安德森下临界维边界（$d_{l}\approx2.5$）。我们提出了一个理论框架，证明用于规避蒙特卡洛动力学陷阱的离散$Z_{2}$规范约束从根本上改变了系统的普适类。通过将算法无序分布映射到二维伊辛共形场论（CFT），我们证明了涌现的空间方差产生了一个分数动量算符，该算符将动力学上临界维驱动至零（$d_{u}\rightarrow0$）。这种边缘拓扑动态地抑制了副本耦合顶点，产生了一个无穷阶的别列津斯基-科斯特利茨-索利斯（BKT）相变和一个不可积的副本模发散，这预言了朝向一步副本对称破缺（1-RSB）的巨大不稳定性。利用直至宏观尺度（$L=1024$）的光谱角转移矩阵重整化群（CTMRG）架构，我们定量验证了拓扑标度论证$\mathcal{G}((T-T_{c})\ln(L/L_{0}))$。通过将连续场论与微观晶格细节隔离，我们恢复了基本晶格度量$L_{0}\approx 0.94$，明确证实了一个独特的、拓扑驱动的自旋玻璃相的存在。</p></details> | 2026-04-11 | Alok Yadav et al. |
| 8 | **[Swap Network Augmented Ansätze on Arbitrary Connectivity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.23679v3)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>Efficient parametrizations of quantum states are essential for trainable hybrid classical-quantum algorithms. A key challenge in their design consists in adapting to the available qubit connectivity of the quantum processor, which limits the capacity to generate correlations between distant qubits in a resource-efficient and trainable manner. In this work we first introduce an algorithm that optimizes qubit routing for arbitrary connectivity graphs, resulting in a swap network that enables direct interactions between any pair of qubits. We then propose a co-design of circuit layers and qubit routing by embedding the derived swap networks within layered, connectivity-aware ansätze. This construction significantly improves the trainability of the ansatz, leading to enhanced performance with reduced resources. We showcase these improvements through ground-state simulations of strongly correlated systems, including spin-glass and molecular electronic structure models. Across exemplified connectivities, the swap-enhanced ansatz consistently achieves lower energy errors using fewer entangling gates, shallower circuits, and fewer parameters than standard layered-structured baselines. Our results indicate that swap network augmented ansätze provide enhanced trainability and resource-efficient design to capture complex correlations on devices with constrained qubit connectivity.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>量子态的高效参数化对于可训练的经典-量子混合算法至关重要。其设计中的一个关键挑战在于如何适应量子处理器有限的比特连接性，这限制了以资源高效且可训练的方式在远距离比特间生成关联的能力。在本工作中，我们首先提出一种针对任意连接图优化比特路由的算法，生成一个交换网络，使得任意比特对之间能够直接相互作用。随后，我们通过将推导出的交换网络嵌入到分层的、连接感知的拟设中，提出了电路层与比特路由的协同设计。这种构造显著改善了拟设的可训练性，从而以更少的资源实现更优的性能。我们通过对强关联系统（包括自旋玻璃和分子电子结构模型）的基态模拟来展示这些改进。在所有示例连接性中，相较于标准的分层结构基线，交换增强的拟设始终能以更少的纠缠门、更浅的电路深度和更少的参数实现更低的能量误差。我们的结果表明，交换网络增强的拟设为在比特连接受限的设备上捕获复杂关联提供了更强的可训练性和资源高效的设计方案。</p></details> | 2026-04-09 | Teodor Parella-Dilmé et al. |
| 9 | **[The Random Subsequence Model and Uniform Codes for the Deletion Channel](https://arxiv.org/abs/2604.07234v1)** | <details><summary>EN</summary><p>We introduce the Random Subsequence Model, a spin glass model on pairs of random strings $(X,Y) \in \{0,1\}^N \times \{0,1\}^M$ whose partition function counts subsequence embeddings of $Y$ into $X$. We study two variants: the null model, where $X$ and $Y$ are independent and uniform, and the planted model, where $X$ is uniform and $Y$ is a uniformly-random length-$M$ subsequence of $X$. We connect the Random Subsequence Model to longstanding problems in various fields, including the best rate achievable by uniformly-random codes in the deletion channel, the longest common subsequence problem between two random strings, and models of directed polymers in statistical physics. In the regime where $N,M\to\infty$ at a fixed ratio $α= M/N \in (0,1)$, we exhibit strict asymptotic separations between the null annealed free energy and the quenched free energies of the null and planted models at all values of the density parameter $α$. This suggests that these models are in a spin glass phase at zero temperature throughout the entire dense regime. As a consequence, we show that uniformly-random codes achieve a positive rate in the deletion channel for all deletion probabilities $p\in [0,1),$ settling multiple conjectures of the second author, Isik and Weissman (2024) and proving the first such positive rate result for the regime $p \geq 1/2$. We also give an exact analytic formula for the annealed free energy of the planted model for all values of the density parameter. This implies a corresponding analytic upper bound on the best rate achievable by uniformly-random codes in the deletion channel, complementing the lower bound from our first result. Our upper and lower bounds for the capacity of the deletion channel under uniform codes are far closer to each other than the best known upper and lower bounds for the capacity of the deletion channel.</p></details><details><summary>中文</summary><p>我们引入了随机子序列模型，这是一个定义在随机字符串对$(X,Y) \in \{0,1\}^N \times \{0,1\}^M$上的自旋玻璃模型，其配分函数计算$Y$嵌入$X$的子序列数。我们研究了两种变体：零模型（其中$X$和$Y$独立且均匀）和植入模型（其中$X$均匀，$Y$是$X$中均匀随机选取的长度为$M$的子序列）。我们将随机子序列模型与多个领域的长期问题联系起来，包括均匀随机码在删除信道中可实现的最佳速率、两个随机字符串间的最长公共子序列问题，以及统计物理学中的有向聚合物模型。在$N,M\to\infty$且固定比率$α= M/N \in (0,1)$的范围内，我们展示了在所有密度参数$α$值下，零模型的退火自由能与零模型及植入模型的淬火自由能之间存在严格的渐近分离。这表明这些模型在整个稠密区域内都处于零温下的自旋玻璃相。因此，我们证明了均匀随机码在所有删除概率$p\in [0,1)$下都能在删除信道中实现正速率，从而解决了第二作者、Isik和Weissman（2024）的多个猜想，并首次为$p \geq 1/2$区域证明了此类正速率结果。我们还给出了植入模型在所有密度参数值下的退火自由能的精确解析公式。这隐含了均匀随机码在删除信道中可实现的最佳速率的一个相应的解析上界，补充了我们第一个结果中的下界。我们得到的均匀随机码下删除信道容量的上下界，比目前已知的删除信道容量的最佳上下界要接近得多。</p></details> | 2026-04-08 | Ryan Jeong et al. |
